summary: Frontend-only verification of two-doctor layout for Thompson Square Medical Centre. Verified DOCTORS array renders both Dr. Aliya Ali and Dr. Irma Khan; only Dr. Irma Khan has the 'Accepting New Patients' badge. Welcome modal, hero line, nav label 'Our Doctors', all doctor photos (dr-aliya.jpg, dr-irma.jpg), logo.png, credentials, expertise items, and tel: booking links all validated on desktop (1920x900) and mobile (390x844). 35/35 assertions passed with 0 console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: TESTIMONIALS block still hard-codes praise for 'Dr. Ali' (data.js lines 143, 155). Since Dr. Irma Khan is now the accepting-new-patients physician, review whether Dr. Ali-only testimonials still fit the two-doctor narrative or should be diversified. Not a blocker, just a content-consistency note.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React landing page, no backend calls beyond a harmless GET /api/ on mount. All doctor-related data-testids verified: doctor-card-aliya, doctor-card-irma, doctor-accepting-irma (present), doctor-accepting-aliya (absent by design), doctor-call-aliya/irma tel: links, welcome-modal, nav-doctor, mobile-nav-doctor. Assets /dr-aliya.jpg (200, ~189KB), /dr-irma.jpg (200, ~135KB), /logo.png (200, ~31KB) all serving correctly.
